revision.comment: I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced
revision.text:
{{{1|[[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of {{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pages using center with no arguments]]}}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: running a new import to try to fix the horrible consequences of that

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
{{{1| }}}
{{safesubst:#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown= |preview=Page using [[Template:Center]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | style }} {{documentation}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:Center]] [[Category:Pages using center with no arguments]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:Center]] [[Category:Pages using center with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:11]] }} [[ja:Template:Center]] [[ja:Template:Center]] [[sn:Center]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
